C:\ST\STM32CubeCLT_1.20.0\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_log.dir/objects.a
C:\dev\llvm-mingw\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_log.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_log.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\dev\llvm-mingw\bin\cc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_log.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test_log.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_log.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_log.dir\linkLibs.rsp
